<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_career_highlights.py. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Career Highlights

::: {.highlight-table .compact-table}

| Metric | Count / Amount | Metric | Count / Amount |
|---|---:|---|---:|
| Peer-reviewed publications | 47 | Books / chapters | 4 |
| Current external funding | 5 | Total external funding | $>60 million |
| Invited talks | 7 | NIH grants | 8 |
| Program leadership roles | 3 | NIH reviewer service | 2 |
| Major media coverage | 26 |  |  |

:::
